short_summary: War ongoing; Iran deal still uncertain
rationale: Active war continues at maximum background level; the unresolved US-Iran deal and continued US focus on Middle East diplomacy keeps uncertainty about Western attention and support for Ukraine elevated.

top_events.title: 'Lots of things can still go wrong' with US-Iran deal
top_events.summary: Continued US diplomatic focus on Iran risks diverting attention and resources from Ukraine; deal uncertainty means Western support posture remains unclear, directly affecting Ukraine's war effort.

top_events.title: Israel attacks Lebanon despite being included in potential peace deal
top_events.summary: Ongoing Middle East escalation keeps US and Western focus split away from Ukraine, indirectly threatening the continuity of military and financial support.

top_events.title: Anthropic suspends AI tools for foreign nationals under US order
top_events.summary: US government security crackdown on AI access for foreign nationals has minimal direct impact on Ukraine's war situation.
